mapper.select: SELECT count(no) FROM board WHERE category = #{category}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board(category, title, content, id, writedate, hit, filename, likes) VALUES(#{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{id}, #{writeDate}, 0, #{fileName}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET hit = hit + 1 WHERE no = #{no}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reply(board_no, id, content, writedate) VALUES(#{boardNo}, #{id}, #{content}, #{writeDate})
mapper.select: SELECT reply_no as replyNo, board_no as boardNo, id, content, writedate as writeDate FROM reply WHERE board_no = #{boardNo} ORDER BY reply_no ASC
SELECT count(*) FROM board_like WHERE board_no = #{boardNo} AND id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM board_like WHERE board_no = #{boardNo} AND id = #{id}
